sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24583" key="diabrabeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαβρᾰβεύω</orth>, <sense id="n24583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bestow,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope> </bibl>(v. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
